name: Implement a feature across multiple files
description: Add input validation to a REST-like handler with a separate validator module. Tests are provided.
prompt: Implement the validation functions in src/validator.js: validateEmail(email) returns boolean, validateCreateUser(body) returns { valid, errors }. Name is required (non-empty string), email is required and must be valid. Do not modify test.js. Make `node test.js` pass.
